channel.title: Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.202.0.VPPRUXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G Russia
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G Russia

Codename: lapis

Version: OS2.0.202.0.VPPRUXM | 15.0

Size: 10.0 GB

MD5: f4a04aeea5b5e0f510401ff3b43d35c6

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to February 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.2.0.WPPINXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G India
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G India

Codename: lapis

Version: OS3.0.2.0.WPPINXM | 16.0

Size: 8.5 GB

MD5: ecd035538dc35691aa044e0cb00bb432

Changelog:
[Xiaomi HyperIsland]
Everything you need to keep an eye on. In one place.
A new format that combines Notification spotlight and device notifications makes any important updates reach you faster.
New UI design lets you see all the details at a glance, with smoother switching between islands.
Now you can pull down to expand small windows and handle multiple tasks more efficiently.
[Revamped visuals]
Cleaner, more refined visuals throughout.
Redesigned Home screen icons now look sharper and more detailed.
The Home screen grid has been redesigned with more balanced margins and more comfortable spacing.
The status bar has a new, cleaner design that's more refined and easier to read.
A new design system improves color comfort, unifies rounded corners across the entire system, and makes controls easier to use for a more consistent look and feel.
A new large-clock Lock screen adds more depth and layers to the layout.
A new all-in-one editor allows you to adjust both the Home screen and Lock screen wallpapers at the same time.
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Interaction with apps has become more intuitive and direct.
Gallery:
New: New Gallery widgets allow you to select your preferred collections for display.
New: You can pin albums now to have quick access to your favorite photos anytime.

Weather:
Optimization: Improved content card blur effects for a smoother, more immersive scrolling experience.

Calendar:
New: Week view gives you a clear look at your weekly schedule.
Optimization: Improved month-view visuals give you clearer highlights for holidays and important events.

Recorder:
Optimization: Accurate start page categories let you locate recordings faster with icons.
Optimization: Improved playback brings you smart noise reduction for clearer voices.
[Basic experience]
Smoother and more stable
Performance enhancements:
Optimization: Refined compiler instructions enhance performance and responsiveness while lowering power use.
Optimization: Improved memory allocation and recovery increases available system memory.
Optimization: Improved integrated frequency scheduling boosts system efficiency and reduces power consumption.
Optimization: Improved short-video playback efficiency for better battery life.

Optimized graphics:
A new window-rendering mechanism reduces graphics-rendering load.

Smoother system animations:
Optimization: Fine-tuned animations across 100+ system scenes for smoother, more natural motion.
[Privacy and security]
Enhanced protection keeps your data private and safe.
The system's privacy and password features have been redesigned with a cleaner, fresher interface.
Advanced data protection now uses post-quantum encryption to keep personal data even more secure.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.2.0.WPPEUXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G EEA
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G EEA

Codename: lapis

Version: OS3.0.2.0.WPPEUXM | 16.0

Size: 9.4 GB

MD5: 06b63a6a2be240d65b8be9770a53e3a8

Changelog:
[Xiaomi HyperIsland]
Everything you need to keep an eye on. In one place.
A new format that combines Notification spotlight and device notifications makes any important updates reach you faster.
New UI design lets you see all the details at a glance, with smoother switching between islands.
Now you can pull down to expand small windows and handle multiple tasks more efficiently.
[Revamped visuals]
Cleaner, more refined visuals throughout.
Redesigned Home screen icons now look sharper and more detailed.
The Home screen grid has been redesigned with more balanced margins and more comfortable spacing.
The status bar has a new, cleaner design that's more refined and easier to read.
A new design system improves color comfort, unifies rounded corners across the entire system, and makes controls easier to use for a more consistent look and feel.
A new large-clock Lock screen adds more depth and layers to the layout.
A new all-in-one editor allows you to adjust both the Home screen and Lock screen wallpapers at the same time.
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Interaction with apps has become more intuitive and direct.
Gallery:
New: New Gallery widgets allow you to select your preferred collections for display.
New: You can pin albums now to have quick access to your favorite photos anytime.

Weather:
Optimization: Improved content card blur effects for a smoother, more immersive scrolling experience.

Calendar:
New: Week view gives you a clear look at your weekly schedule.
Optimization: Improved month-view visuals give you clearer highlights for holidays and important events.

Recorder:
Optimization: Accurate start page categories let you locate recordings faster with icons.
Optimization: Improved playback brings you smart noise reduction for clearer voices.
[Basic experience]
Smoother and more stable
Performance enhancements:
Optimization: Refined compiler instructions enhance performance and responsiveness while lowering power use.
Optimization: Improved memory allocation and recovery increases available system memory.
Optimization: Improved integrated frequency scheduling boosts system efficiency and reduces power consumption.
Optimization: Improved short-video playback efficiency for better battery life.

Optimized graphics:
A new window-rendering mechanism reduces graphics-rendering load.

Smoother system animations:
Optimization: Fine-tuned animations across 100+ system scenes for smoother, more natural motion.
[Privacy and security]
Enhanced protection keeps your data private and safe.
The system's privacy and password features have been redesigned with a cleaner, fresher interface.
Advanced data protection now uses post-quantum encryption to keep personal data even more secure.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.2.0.WPPINXM Recovery update for Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G India
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G India

Codename: lapis

Version: OS3.0.2.0.WPPINXM | 16.0

Size: 6.3 GB

MD5: 2d3367a50ed3a460a4724b9093819c7d

Changelog:
[Xiaomi HyperIsland]
Everything you need to keep an eye on. In one place.
A new format that combines Notification spotlight and device notifications makes any important updates reach you faster.
New UI design lets you see all the details at a glance, with smoother switching between islands.
Now you can pull down to expand small windows and handle multiple tasks more efficiently.
[Revamped visuals]
Cleaner, more refined visuals throughout.
Redesigned Home screen icons now look sharper and more detailed.
The Home screen grid has been redesigned with more balanced margins and more comfortable spacing.
The status bar has a new, cleaner design that's more refined and easier to read.
A new design system improves color comfort, unifies rounded corners across the entire system, and makes controls easier to use for a more consistent look and feel.
A new large-clock Lock screen adds more depth and layers to the layout.
A new all-in-one editor allows you to adjust both the Home screen and Lock screen wallpapers at the same time.

New: New Gallery widgets allow you to select your preferred collections for display.
New: You can pin albums now to have quick access to your favorite photos anytime.

Optimization: Improved content card blur effects for a smoother, more immersive scrolling experience.

New: Week view gives you a clear look at your weekly schedule.
Optimization: Improved month-view visuals give you clearer highlights for holidays and important events.

Optimization: Accurate start page categories let you locate recordings faster with icons.
Optimization: Improved playback brings you smart noise reduction for clearer voices.
[Basic experience]

Optimization: Refined compiler instructions enhance performance and responsiveness while lowering power use.
Optimization: Improved memory allocation and recovery increases available system memory.
Optimization: Improved integrated frequency scheduling boosts system efficiency and reduces power consumption.
Optimization: Improved short-video playback efficiency for better battery life.

Optimized graphics:
A new window-rendering mechanism reduces graphics-rendering load.

Smoother system animations:
Optimization: Fine-tuned animations across 100+ system scenes for smoother, more natural motion.
[Privacy and security]
Enhanced protection keeps your data private and safe.
The system's privacy and password features have been redesigned with a cleaner, fresher interface.
Advanced data protection now uses post-quantum encryption to keep personal data even more secure.

Version: OS3.0.2.0.WPPEUXM | 16.0

Size: 6.7 GB

Changelog:
[Xiaomi HyperIsland]
Everything you need to keep an eye on. In one place.
A new format that combines Notification spotlight and device notifications makes any important updates reach you faster.
New UI design lets you see all the details at a glance, with smoother switching between islands.
Now you can pull down to expand small windows and handle multiple tasks more efficiently.
[Revamped visuals]
Cleaner, more refined visuals throughout.
Redesigned Home screen icons now look sharper and more detailed.
The Home screen grid has been redesigned with more balanced margins and more comfortable spacing.
The status bar has a new, cleaner design that's more refined and easier to read.
A new design system improves color comfort, unifies rounded corners across the entire system, and makes controls easier to use for a more consistent look and feel.
A new large-clock Lock screen adds more depth and layers to the layout.

Gallery:

Optimization: Improved content card blur effects for a smoother, more immersive scrolling experience.

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.202.0.VPPEUXM Recovery update for Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G EEA
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G EEA

Codename: lapis

Version: OS2.0.202.0.VPPEUXM | 15.0

Size: 6.4 GB

MD5: c90e9b3184444c27513b81bf432eccc6

Changelog:
[System animations]
Optimization: Interrupt animation when entering subpages within apps
Optimization: Interrupt animation during app transitions
Optimization: Interrupt animation when closing apps in Landscape mode
[System]
New: Home screen wallpaper now supports a blur effect
Optimization: Updated styles for some classic pages
Optimization: Scrolling performance on content feeds in some third party apps
Optimization: Animation effects when launching apps
Updated the security patch to November 2025. Increased system security.
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Tweaked the Storage refresh algorithm so it activates more often
[Lock screen]
New: Eastern aesthetics lock screen templates
New: Customizable Lock screen shortcuts
[Camera]
All-new design
Brand-new visual language: A more professional visual style provides a deeper sense of immersion while shooting.
· Structure optimization: We streamlined the feature menus and optimized the settings page.
Pro mode upgrade: Adjusted the interface layout and combined parameter options to reduce preview obstruction and help you focus on your creative process.
Enhanced watermark features:
· Film frame watermark now supports black or white backgrounds
· The standard watermark supports custom positioning.
Expanded personalization settings: Added support for multiple camera interface color schemes.
[Settings]
Optimization: Added a shortcut to system navigation settings in Home screen settings
[Status bar, Notification shade]
New: Some status bar icons now support custom display
[Accessibility]
Fix: Touch gestures stopped working in TalkBack mode
Fix: Volume buttons didn't work in TalkBack mode
Fix: Issues that prevented Recorder from capturing TalkBack audio
Fix: Issues with announcements for unselected items in Calendar and other apps
Fix: Some buttons weren't announced in several apps, including Settings, Control center, Messaging, Contacts, Weather, Notes, and Browser

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.201.0.VPPTWXM Recovery update for Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G Taiwan
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G Taiwan

Codename: lapis

Version: OS2.0.201.0.VPPTWXM | 15.0

Size: 6.1 GB

MD5: cfe39a6d93befb699ff2489528d675a7

Changelog:
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Tweaked the Storage refresh algorithm so it activates more often
[System animations]
Optimization: Interrupt animation when entering subpages within apps
Optimization: Interrupt animation during app transitions
Optimization: Interrupt animation when closing apps in Landscape mode
[System]
New: Home screen wallpaper now supports a blur effect
Optimization: Updated styles for some classic pages
Optimization: Scrolling performance on content feeds in some third party apps
Optimization: Animation effects when launching apps
[Lock screen]
New: Eastern aesthetics lock screen templates
New: Customizable Lock screen shortcuts
[Camera]
All-new design
Brand-new visual language: A more professional visual style provides a deeper sense of immersion while shooting.
· Structure optimization: We streamlined the feature menus and optimized the settings page.
Pro mode upgrade: Adjusted the interface layout and combined parameter options to reduce preview obstruction and help you focus on your creative process.
Enhanced watermark features:
· Film frame watermark now supports black or white backgrounds
· The standard watermark supports custom positioning.
Expanded personalization settings: Added support for multiple camera interface color schemes.
[Settings]
Optimization: Added a shortcut to system navigation settings in Home screen settings
[Status bar, Notification shade]
New: Some status bar icons now support custom display
[Accessibility]
Fix: Touch gestures stopped working in TalkBack mode
Fix: Volume buttons didn't work in TalkBack mode
Fix: Issues that prevented Recorder from capturing TalkBack audio
Fix: Issues with announcements for unselected items in Calendar and other apps
Fix: Some buttons weren't announced in several apps, including Settings, Control center, Messaging, Contacts, Weather, Notes, and Browser

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.201.0.VPPMIXM Recovery update for Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G Global
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G Global

Codename: lapis

Version: OS2.0.201.0.VPPMIXM | 15.0

Size: 6.3 GB

MD5: bb2b77b7e665c85c633bb7c4387f4e7c

Changelog:
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Tweaked the Storage refresh algorithm so it activates more often
[System animations]
Optimization: Interrupt animation when entering subpages within apps
Optimization: Interrupt animation during app transitions
Optimization: Interrupt animation when closing apps in Landscape mode
[System]
New: Home screen wallpaper now supports a blur effect
Optimization: Updated styles for some classic pages
Optimization: Scrolling performance on content feeds in some third party apps
Optimization: Animation effects when launching apps
[Lock screen]
New: Eastern aesthetics lock screen templates
New: Customizable Lock screen shortcuts
[Camera]
All-new design
Brand-new visual language: A more professional visual style provides a deeper sense of immersion while shooting.
· Structure optimization: We streamlined the feature menus and optimized the settings page.
Pro mode upgrade: Adjusted the interface layout and combined parameter options to reduce preview obstruction and help you focus on your creative process.
Enhanced watermark features:
· Film frame watermark now supports black or white backgrounds
· The standard watermark supports custom positioning.
Expanded personalization settings: Added support for multiple camera interface color schemes.
[Settings]
Optimization: Added a shortcut to system navigation settings in Home screen settings
[Status bar, Notification shade]
New: Some status bar icons now support custom display
[Accessibility]
Fix: Touch gestures stopped working in TalkBack mode
Fix: Volume buttons didn't work in TalkBack mode
Fix: Issues that prevented Recorder from capturing TalkBack audio
Fix: Issues with announcements for unselected items in Calendar and other apps
Fix: Some buttons weren't announced in several apps, including Settings, Control center, Messaging, Contacts, Weather, Notes, and Browser

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WPPCNXM Recovery update for Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G China
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G China

Codename: lapis

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WPPCNXM | 16.0

Size: 7.4 GB

MD5: 3ee16184b4b7e3a1e1c7c21c33ed9e68

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Xiaomi HyperIsland:
New: Support for Xiaomi HyperIsland in File Manager, showing real time progress for online files
New: Support for Xiaomi HyperIsland with transit and key cards, including swiping from the Lock screen

Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi:
New: Support for continuous conversations with Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi while holding the Power button

Camera:
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Family Guard:
New: The option to view and edit Family Guard settings before you turn on Child mode
Optimization: Saving feature settings when turning off On-device guardianship
Optimization: Screen time stats in Child mode

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: Cloud drive file thumbnails in File Manager displayed incorrectly in some cases
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: An issue where WeChat couldn't access screenshots in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
Fix: An input field display issue when renaming a custom card in Smart cards in Dark mode
Fix: Overlapping buttons in Smart cards in some cases
Optimization: The timeliness and accuracy of weather location updates when your location changes
New: One-tap upload in Gallery to submit your work to the Xiaomi Imagery Global Awards Curated with Leica
*To use this feature, make sure Security is version 12.3.1-260225.0.1 or later, and Mi Store is version 5.49.0 or later
[Interconnectivity]
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: On Mac, Xiaomi Interconnectivity now lets you view Xiaomi Cloud Notes and Gallery
[Privacy and security]
New: With the Passwords app, you can auto-save, autofill, and sync end-to-end encrypted passwords across devices
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

Incremental Update: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.2.0.WPPTRXM Recovery update for Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G Turkey
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G Turkey

Codename: lapis

Version: OS3.0.2.0.WPPTRXM | 16.0

Size: 6.5 GB

MD5: 00e0e1096ac50aa9a405ae9fa64ccba3

Changelog:
[Xiaomi HyperIsland]
Everything you need to keep an eye on. In one place.
A new format that combines Notification spotlight and device notifications makes any important updates reach you faster.
New UI design lets you see all the details at a glance, with smoother switching between islands.
Now you can pull down to expand small windows and handle multiple tasks more efficiently.
[Revamped visuals]
Cleaner, more refined visuals throughout.
Redesigned Home screen icons now look sharper and more detailed.
The Home screen grid has been redesigned with more balanced margins and more comfortable spacing.
The status bar has a new, cleaner design that's more refined and easier to read.
A new design system improves color comfort, unifies rounded corners across the entire system, and makes controls easier to use for a more consistent look and feel.
A new large-clock Lock screen adds more depth and layers to the layout.
A new all-in-one editor allows you to adjust both the Home screen and Lock screen wallpapers at the same time.
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Interaction with apps has become more intuitive and direct.
Gallery:
New: New Gallery widgets allow you to select your preferred collections for display.
New: You can pin albums now to have quick access to your favorite photos anytime.

Weather:
Optimization: Improved content card blur effects for a smoother, more immersive scrolling experience.

Calendar:
New: Week view gives you a clear look at your weekly schedule.
Optimization: Improved month-view visuals give you clearer highlights for holidays and important events.

Recorder:
Optimization: Accurate start page categories let you locate recordings faster with icons.
Optimization: Improved playback brings you smart noise reduction for clearer voices.
[Basic experience]
Smoother and more stable
Performance enhancements:
Optimization: Refined compiler instructions enhance performance and responsiveness while lowering power use.
Optimization: Improved memory allocation and recovery increases available system memory.
Optimization: Improved integrated frequency scheduling boosts system efficiency and reduces power consumption.
Optimization: Improved short-video playback efficiency for better battery life.

Optimized graphics:
A new window-rendering mechanism reduces graphics-rendering load.

Smoother system animations:
Optimization: Fine-tuned animations across 100+ system scenes for smoother, more natural motion.
[Privacy and security]
Enhanced protection keeps your data private and safe.
The system's privacy and password features have been redesigned with a cleaner, fresher interface.
Advanced data protection now uses post-quantum encryption to keep personal data even more secure.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.2.0.WPPIDXM Recovery update for Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G Indonesia
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G Indonesia

Codename: lapis

Version: OS3.0.2.0.WPPIDXM | 16.0

Size: 6.5 GB

MD5: 2a271a5452c0616cab161b846e5d858b

Changelog:
[Xiaomi HyperIsland]
Everything you need to keep an eye on. In one place.
A new format that combines Notification spotlight and device notifications makes any important updates reach you faster.
New UI design lets you see all the details at a glance, with smoother switching between islands.
Now you can pull down to expand small windows and handle multiple tasks more efficiently.
[Revamped visuals]
Cleaner, more refined visuals throughout.
Redesigned Home screen icons now look sharper and more detailed.
The Home screen grid has been redesigned with more balanced margins and more comfortable spacing.
The status bar has a new, cleaner design that's more refined and easier to read.
A new design system improves color comfort, unifies rounded corners across the entire system, and makes controls easier to use for a more consistent look and feel.
A new large-clock Lock screen adds more depth and layers to the layout.
A new all-in-one editor allows you to adjust both the Home screen and Lock screen wallpapers at the same time.
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Interaction with apps has become more intuitive and direct.
Gallery:
New: New Gallery widgets allow you to select your preferred collections for display.
New: You can pin albums now to have quick access to your favorite photos anytime.

Weather:
Optimization: Improved content card blur effects for a smoother, more immersive scrolling experience.

Calendar:
New: Week view gives you a clear look at your weekly schedule.
Optimization: Improved month-view visuals give you clearer highlights for holidays and important events.

Recorder:
Optimization: Accurate start page categories let you locate recordings faster with icons.
Optimization: Improved playback brings you smart noise reduction for clearer voices.
[Basic experience]
Smoother and more stable
Performance enhancements:
Optimization: Refined compiler instructions enhance performance and responsiveness while lowering power use.
Optimization: Improved memory allocation and recovery increases available system memory.
Optimization: Improved integrated frequency scheduling boosts system efficiency and reduces power consumption.
Optimization: Improved short-video playback efficiency for better battery life.

Optimized graphics:
A new window-rendering mechanism reduces graphics-rendering load.

Smoother system animations:
Optimization: Fine-tuned animations across 100+ system scenes for smoother, more natural motion.
[Privacy and security]
Enhanced protection keeps your data private and safe.
The system's privacy and password features have been redesigned with a cleaner, fresher interface.
Advanced data protection now uses post-quantum encryption to keep personal data even more secure.

Download: Here
